title: BEM-875 response findings
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_RESPONSE.md: 
Findings:
- Internal contour approves protocol v1.3 with notes.
- Pre-P0 repository cleanup must become a mandatory gate before P0.
- A Worker is defined as one Curator plus one or more internal contours.
- Parallel execution requires isolated workspaces, explicit task IDs, dependency IDs, and a controlled integration lane.
- Architecture control must track target architecture, actual architecture, delta, and remaining work.
No issue comments.
